case_title: GROSVENOR PROPERTIES LTD., A CALIFORNIA CORP. vs. MCCARVER, ROBERT DR.

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GROSVENOR PROPERTIES LTD., A CALIFORNIA CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT MCCARVER, ROBERT DR. SUMMONS ISSUED
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT MCCARVER, ROBERT DR. HEARING SET FOR DEC-13-1999 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 301, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, CALENDAR OF DEC-13-1999 THE 3-DAY NTC REFERS TO RENT OWING FOR THE PERIOD ENDING 10/15/99.THIS APPEARS TO BE INCORRECT BECAUSE THE RENT IS OWING FOR THE PERIOD OF 10/1 TO 11/1.THE NTC OVERSTATED THE RENT OWING FOR THE PERIOD ENDING 10/15 & DEMURRER IS SUST. W/ LVE TO AMEND.PLTFF SHALL HAVE 5 DAYS LVE TO AMEND.
REPLY MEMORANDUM IN SUPPORT OF DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT MCCARVER, ROBERT DR.
